message:
refactor: clippy fixes and code improvements

agent.rs:
- Add #[allow(clippy::unnecessary_literal_bound)] for where clause
  that clippy incorrectly flags as unnecessary

extensions_js.rs:
- Change InterruptBudget::new to const fn for compile-time evaluation
- Fix error handling to take references instead of owned values,
  reducing unnecessary clones when propagating errors

interactive.rs:
- Code formatting and whitespace cleanup
- Remove duplicate BashExecution handling block that was redundant
  with the consolidated match arm above

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
